mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO comments(comment_no, communityno, memberno, nickname, content, parent_no, depth, rdate, is_deleted) VALUES( comments_seq.nextval, #{communityno}, #{memberno}, #{nickname}, #{content},
NULL #{parent_no} , #{depth}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT comment_no, communityno, memberno, nickname, content, parent_no, depth, rdate, is_deleted FROM comments WHERE comment_no = #{comment_no}

SELECT comment_no, communityno, memberno, nickname, content, parent_no, depth, rdate, is_deleted FROM comments WHERE communityno = #{communityno} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY NVL(parent_no, comment_no), comment_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE communityno = #{communityno} AND is_deleted = 'N'
